title: How do I ask a question?
body:
All bug reports, feature requests and discussions should happen in the [SkiaSharp](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp) repository as that is where they are monitored.

Any new issues here will be closed.

 - Bug Report: https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/issues
 - Feature Request: https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/issues
 - Questions and/or Discussions: https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/discussions
